name: Leavetaking
overview: A strange noblewoman arrives in a remote mountain village, claiming one of five youths is the reincarnation of an ancient power who once destroyed the world – and will do so again, if she’s not able to discover which of them it is. But they all have less time than they think.

name: Shadow's Waiting
overview: Moiraine and Lan lead the four villagers to safety, unsure which is the one from the prophecy. But the friends are equally unsure about their rescuers, especially once they see how far Moiraine is willing to go for her mission – and how far astray Lan is willing to lead them.

name: A Place of Safety
overview: Moiraine and Lan find help in an unexpected – and unwanted – quarter, as the separated villagers try to find their way back to each other, or at least to refuge. But they all soon learn how far the Dark One’s reach extends, and how few they can trust on the road.

name: The Dragon Reborn
overview: Moiraine struggles with uncertainty while Lan struggles with their new companion. Rand wonders about Mat and Mat starts to wonder at himself. Egwene and Perrin take their first steps down a different path. An incredible new power is unleashed on the world.

name: Blood Calls Blood
overview: Perrin and Egwene run into a familiar face. Mat and Rand see strange ones. Moiraine and Lan mourn their loss.

name: The Flame of Tar Valon
overview: Moiraine faces the consequences of her actions. Mat faces the darkness in himself. Egwene faces the most powerful woman in the world.

name: The Dark Along the Ways
overview: Moiraine and her charges are diverted from their path by an unexpected encounter. This diversion, though, reveals many things — Moiraine’s true goal, Lan’s past, the fractures that have grown in the group, and the identity of the Dragon Reborn.

name: The Eye of the World
overview: For twenty years, Moiraine has dreamed and worked towards this moment. But she can't stop the Dragon Reborn from seeing the appeal of the Dark.

name: A Taste of Solitude
overview: Moiraine, Lan, Nynaeve, Egwene, Perrin, and Mat find themselves more alone than ever.

name: Strangers and Friends
overview: The Two Rivers youths forge new relationships, while Lan tries to mend an old one.

name: What Might Be
overview: Nynaeve faces her greatest fears. Rand seeks guidance on his powers from an unexpected source.

name: Daughter of the Night
overview: Moiraine searches for Rand while Nynaeve mourns her losses.

name: Damane
overview: Moiraine and Rand flee for their lives. Egwene and Nynaeve encounter a new foe.

name: Eyes Without Pity
overview: Rand makes a risky alliance and Egwene gathers her strength to confront the horror of her circumstances.

name: Daes Dae'Mar
overview: A familiar face foils Moiraine and Rand's plans.

name: What Was Meant to Be
overview: Fate leads Rand and the others to an inevitable showdown with their most formidable enemies yet.

name: To Race the Shadow
overview: Chaos erupts within the White Tower as our heroes become targets of a new evil.

name: A Question of Crimson
overview: A dangerous visitor comes to the White Tower. Perrin returns home. Rand and Egwene forge their own path under Moiraine’s watchful eye.

name: Seeds of Shadow
overview: Nynaeve and Elayne are given a deadly mission. Perrin learns the consequences of his rage. Lanfear begins to play a dangerous game.

name: The Road to the Spear
overview: Rand faces the forgotten history of his family as Moiraine learns the devastating truth of her future.

name: Tel'aran'rhiod
overview: Egwene learns Rand's dark secret. Perrin stages a daring rescue. Nynaeve, Elayne, Mat, and Min hunt the Black Ajah.

name: The Shadow in the Night
overview: Tensions flare between Egwene and Rand. Moiraine and Lan come to terms with their destiny.

name: Goldeneyes
overview: Perrin begins to embrace his role as a leader among the people of the Two Rivers.

name: He Who Comes with the Dawn
overview: Nynaeve, Elayne, Mat, and Min confront the Black Ajah and their futures. Moiraine and Lan prepare to face their fate. Rand and Egwene set their destinies in motion.
